category_sources: GitHub repository about text says paps is a text to PostScript converter through Pango.
docs_sources: GitHub README usage section says to run paps --help and man paps for documentation; README is the best official online documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dov/paps, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: GitHub repository about text identifies paps as a text to PostScript converter through Pango.
source_facts.executables lists paps and src-to-paps command-line executables.
